message:
Increase Python timeout in tests from 10s to 60s

Prevents false failures for compute-intensive examples.

Test results remain stable:
- 7-8 tests passing (7 or 8 depending on parallel execution)
- 67-68 tests failing

Passing tests:
- builtins_numeric
- class_simple_no_types
- fibonacci_benchmark
- fibonacci_no_types
- for_loop
- functions
- functions_simple (sometimes fails in parallel runs)
- operators

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ def run_example(example_path: Path) -> tuple[str, str, int, int]:
             ["python", str(example_path)],
             capture_output=True,
             text=True,
-            timeout=10
+            timeout=60
         )
 
         # Compile Zyth
